name: 16p11_2_SULT1A_paralog_array
description: SULT1A1/SULT1A2/SULT1A3/SULT1A4 sulfotransferase gene cluster — a 16p11.2 BP4/BP5 paralog quartet at >99% identity. SULT1A3 (proximal) and SULT1A4 (distal) are >99.9% identical and span the BP4-BP5 NAHR substrate; CNV-active.

architecture.internal_structure: SULT1A1 single-copy plus SULT1A2 single-copy at distal 16p11.2; SULT1A3/A4 paralogs at >99.9% identity inside BP4 and BP5 SD blocks; co-localised with BOLA2A/B.
